scenes.description: a sunny Egyptian garden picnic beside a lemon tree
scenes.action: standing together and holding a plain wicker picnic basket

scenes.description: a cozy moonlit library with blue shelves
scenes.action: reaching together for one blank-cover picture book

scenes.description: a bright beach with a simple sandcastle and striped parasol
scenes.action: building the sandcastle with one red bucket

scenes.description: a colorful open-air fruit stall with oranges and lemons
scenes.action: choosing fruit while standing in one clear row
